name: Peanut Butter`n Jelly Bars
recipeIngredient: 2 cups (12 oz. package) Reese's peanut butter chips
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, sugar, and baking powder in a large bowl.
2. Add the softened butter to the dry ingredients. Cut in with a fork or pastry cutter until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Stir in the beaten eggs until the dough is smooth and well combined.
4. Set aside half of the dough.
5. Press the remaining dough into a greased 9 x 13 inch pan, creating an even layer on the bottom.
6. Spread the grape jelly evenly over the crust.
7. Sprinkle the peanut butter chips over the jelly.
8. Crumble the reserved dough and sprinkle it over the peanut butter chips.
9. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 30-35 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
10. Remove from the oven and immediately sprinkle with the remaining peanut butter chips.
11. Allow to cool completely before cutting into squares.
